ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Disputationibus interiecti cum theses ex universa philosophia Bonis Auspiciijs Excellentiss. Principis M. Antonii Burghesii publice defendit. Pompeius Mousonius Aquilanus. Academicus Parhtenius
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Franchi, Impressioni sceniche, p. 799, no 21, specifies that there is no author. The choruses were sang on the occasion of Manzoni`s doctorate in philosophy.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
